current.headline: The Unbuckled 8%: A Tiny Minority Produces Nearly Half of America's Traffic Deaths
revisions_round_1: Pickup registration share (18%) now attributed to IHS Markit/S&P Global Mobility [ref 7]
Ecological fallacy caveat added: NOPUS 2024 and FARS 2023 measure different populations in different years
Nighttime 3x claim now specifies methodology: FARS HOUR field cross-tab, per-hour ratio
Attribution estimate added: 4,700-6,300 of 10,484 deaths potentially preventable based on NHTSA efficacy rates
Reference 7 added for vehicle registration data

lastPublished: 2026-03-16: The 40-Inch Line: Above It, Your Truck's Front End Becomes a Pedestrian Death Machine (hood-height-pedestrian-death-machine)
